title: Monumental Recipes
description: This mod is the Core Mod used for all the Custom Recipes used in ModernGamingWorld's modpacks
body:
Welcome to Monumental Recipes

A unified crafting system designed to enhance your experience by centralizing all custom recipes introduced across the Monumental series.

This system provides streamlined access to a wide range of unique crafting options, all carefully balanced and integrated into the modpack’s progression and gameplay.

Custom Recipes
An extensive collection of handcrafted recipes that go beyond vanilla Minecraft. Discover new item combinations, specialized tools, powerful weapons, advanced armor sets, and unique decorative blocks — all designed to expand your crafting possibilities.

⚠️ Important Information
For the best experience, ensure Monumental Recipes is installed correctly alongside the Monumental Experience modpack. This helps prevent compatibility issues and ensures all systems function as intended.

Enjoy expanded crafting possibilities and a more immersive gameplay experience with Monumental Recipes.

Happy Crafting!
